justification.what: Provision 1x Hetzner Cloud cax21 ARM server (4vCPU / 8GB / 80GB) in Helsinki (hel1) running mr-factory:0.1.3.
justification.where: Hetzner Cloud hel1; VM id 127678759; IP 204.168.229.46; docker swarm single-node.
justification.why: Migrate MR Factory off Vultr vhp-8c-16gb-amd ($96/mo) for ~90% cost reduction; ARM64 suits stateless Go workload.
justification.who: Operator (tngo) blanket approval 2026-04-21 for MR -> Hetzner migration; agent (ccmac-sonnet-4.6) executed.
justification.how_helps: Frees budget for higher-value services (LiteLLM, Drata SOC2, GrowthBook, ops-console); proves migration primitive.
justification.expected_return: ~$85/mo saved, ~$1020/yr; unlocks Target-1 pilot economics (sub-$50/mo per-tenant stack).
